overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia jogging along a winding dirt path through a vibrant, flower-filled meadow. The character passes a medieval stone castle situated on a lakeshore and encounters NPC riders on horseback in a sunny, open countryside setting with distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the dirt path through tall grass and wildflowers

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the meadow
lush green grass with scattered wildflowers
tall grass with red poppies and purple lupines
clusters of green leafy trees lining the path
blue mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt jogs along a narrow dirt path cutting through a vibrant summer meadow. Tall grass and colorful wildflowers including red poppies and purple lupines fill the landscape, with clusters of deciduous trees on the right and distant mountains visible ahead under a bright blue sky.

events.description: medieval stone castle and adjacent lake come into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while observing the castle structure appearing on the left

entered.detail: medieval fortress with stone walls and towers situated by the water
calm blue lake surrounding the castle base

segments.scene_description: The path continues through fields of yellow flowers as a impressive stone castle comes into view on the left, situated on the shore of a calm lake. The landscape opens up to reveal more of the surrounding hills and the distant mountain range.

events.description: two riders on horseback appear ahead on the path, approaching from the distance
horseback riders pass by on the right side of the path and continue ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as two riders approach and pass by

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback traveling along the path, passing by Geralt

entered.detail: cluster of medieval-style houses and structures visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: As the castle remains visible on the left, two NPC riders on horseback appear ahead on the path and pass by on the right. A distant village becomes visible ahead while the path continues through dense greenery and wildflowers.

agents.ego_description: jogging toward the distant village buildings while following the winding path

segments.scene_description: With the castle now behind, the path winds through scattered trees and meadows as the village buildings grow larger in the distance. The trail continues toward the settlement with dense forest visible on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path that transitions from a vibrant wildflower meadow toward a distant rural settlement. It begins with Geralt jogging through tall grass and colorful poppies and lupines, with deciduous trees lining the right side under a bright blue sky. As the path continues through fields of yellow flowers, the landscape opens up to reveal an impressive stone castle situated on the shore of a calm lake to the left. The scene then shifts as two riders on horseback pass by on the right, while a distant village emerges ahead through the dense greenery. Finally, with the castle receding behind, the trail winds through scattered trees and meadows, drawing closer to the village buildings as a dense forest appears on the right.
